title: cyperus alatus subsp. ascolepidioides
intro: Cyperus alatus subsp. ascolepidioides, also known as umbrella sedge, is a plant species within the genus Cyperus, characterized by its umbrella-like inflorescence. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus alatus subsp. ascolepidioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
